articles.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
articles.description: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150M from Meituan and Tencent at a $1B valuation.
articles.author: Kate Park

articles.title: This humanoid robotics company is going public, but its CEO isn’t promising a robot in your home anytime soon
articles.description: While other humanoid startups chase sky-high valuations, Agility Robotics is betting its future on execution — and a SPAC.
articles.author: Connie Loizos
